word: G1541 - ἑκατονταέτης - hekatontaétēs - hek-at-on-tah-et'-ace - Hundred years old

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑκατονταέτης

- Transliteration: hekatontaetes

- Phonetic: hek-at-on-tah-et'-ace

- Definition:

1. centenarian, a hundred years old

- Origin: from G1540 and G2094

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1540 and G2094; centenarian: - hundred years old.
